name: Raycast
description: Blazingly fast, extensible launcher and productivity tool for macOS with app launching, file search, clipboard history, window management, and extensive plugin store

version_check.url: Sparkle appcast URL is BLOCKED behind Cloudflare protection — not publicly accessible
version_check.fallback: Follow redirect on https://releases.raycast.com/releases/latest/download?build=universal to get versioned download URL, or scrape https://www.raycast.com/changelog

notes: macOS-exclusive application. Sparkle appcast URLs are behind Cloudflare protection and cannot be queried externally. Version tracking relies on following download redirects or scraping the changelog page. Paid Pro features available via subscription. Extensions can be published via the Raycast Store. Also offers Raycast AI as an add-on.
